---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new or an improvement to an existing capability
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the gap or friction you're running into. Concrete is better than abstract. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like to see? Be as specific as you can. -->

## Which area would this touch?

- [ ] Trackpad / gesture input
- [ ] Keyboard input
- [ ] System / media controls
- [ ] App launcher / URL opener
- [ ] Auth / connection security
- [ ] Frontend UI (index.html)
- [ ] Menu bar / macOS app
- [ ] WebSocket protocol
- [ ] PWA / offline behaviour
- [ ] Other

## Constraints to keep in mind

Before proposing, check that the idea fits within the project's hard limits:

- No external libraries (Swift or JS)
- No network calls outside LAN
- `index.html` stays a single self-contained file
- Total bundle stays under 1MB
- Protocol changes must remain backward compatible

<!-- If your idea requires an exception, explain why it's worth it. -->

<!-- What else did you think about? Why did you rule it out? -->
